title: chore(deps-dev): bump koa from 3.1.1 to 3.1.2
summary: Dependabot patch bump of koa from 3.1.1 to 3.1.2. The koa 3.1.2 release includes a security fix for Host Header Injection via ctx.hostname (GHSA-7gcc-r8m5-44qm) plus minor dependency bumps and doc fixes. Changes span server-adapters/koa/package.json, workflows/inngest/package.json, and pnpm-lock.yaml. The large line count is due to lockfile churn including unrelated resolved-version updates (ast-grep, ai-sdk, zod references).
maintainerNotes: PR has merge conflicts (mergeableState: CONFLICTING) and CI build is failing — multiple test suites failed (Agent Builder, Core, MCP, Memory, Observability, RAG) and build validation failed. The koa 3.1.2 release contains a security fix (Host Header Injection), so this should be prioritized. However, the conflicts and CI failures need to be resolved first — dependabot will likely need to rebase. Consider closing and letting dependabot recreate, or manually rebasing the branch.
